narrative: I am currently observing a medium-severity Neo4j authentication error disrupting memory persistence in Mem0, which affects cross-session fact extraction and knowledge graph integrity. My inspection reveals five agents lacking versioned prompts (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, reasoning_methods), creating consistency risks in their task execution. I noticed these gaps alongside the authentication failure, prioritizing both issues for the self-improvement crew to address. This combined discrepancy requires immediate corrective action to maintain operational reliability.
